description.value:
Your commands help your team evade notice. Signal all squadmates within your banner's aura; until the end of your next turn, you and each ally count as Following the Expert for any checks to [[/act hide]] or [[/act sneak]] and can ignore the noisy trait on any armor you wear. If you spend 2 actions to use this tactic, up to two squadmates within your banner's aura can also either Hide or Sneak as a free action.

Special If you have this tactic prepared, you can use Warfare Lore in place of Stealth for checks you attempt to Hide and Sneak.
